lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਨ ਊਪਜੈ ਭਾਈ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur preet na aoopajai bhaaee manamukh doojai bhaae |
lines.english: Without the Guru, love for the Lord does not well up, O Siblings of Destiny; the self-willed manmukhs are engrossed in the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਹ ਕੁਟਹਿ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਹਿ ਭਾਈ ਪਲੈ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tuh kutteh manamukh karam kareh bhaaee palai kichhoo na paae |2|
lines.english: Actions performed by the manmukh are like the threshing of the chaff - they obtain nothing for their efforts. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਰਵਿਆ ਭਾਈ ਸਾਚੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur miliai naam man raviaa bhaaee saachee preet piaar |
lines.english: Meeting the Guru, the Naam comes to permeate the mind, O Siblings of Destiny, with true love and affection.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਰਵੈ ਭਾਈ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਹੇਤਿ ਅਪਾਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sadaa har ke gun ravai bhaaee gur kai het apaar |3|
lines.english: He always sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord, O Siblings of Destiny, with infinite love for the Guru. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇਆ ਸੋ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਹੈ ਭਾਈ ਜਿ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aaeaa so paravaan hai bhaaee ji gur sevaa chit laae |
lines.english: How blessed and approved is his coming into the world, O Siblings of Destiny, who focuses his mind on serving the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਭਾਈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਮੇਲਾਇ ॥੪॥੮॥
lines.translit: naanak naam har paaeeai bhaaee gurasabadee melaae |4|8|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Name of the Lord is obtained, O Siblings of Destiny, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, and we merge with the Lord. ||4||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 3 ghar 1 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Third Mehl, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਹੀ ਗੁਣੀ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣੁ ਵਿਆਪਿਆ ਭਾਈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝ ਬੁਝਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tihee gunee tribhavan viaapiaa bhaaee guramukh boojh bujhaae |
lines.english: The three worlds are entangled in the three qualities, O Siblings of Destiny; the Guru imparts understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਛੋਡਿ ਚਉਥੈ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man re trai gun chhodd chauthai chit laae |
lines.english: O mind, renounce the three qualities, and focus your consciousness on the fourth state.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਗਿ ਛੂਟੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਪੂਛਹੁ ਗਿਆਨੀਆ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raam naam lag chhootteeai bhaaee poochhahu giaaneea jaae |1|
lines.english: Attached to the Lord's Name, one is emancipated, O Siblings of Destiny; go and ask the wise ones about this. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਤੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਭਾਈ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo terai man vasai bhaaee sadaa har ke gun gaae | rahaau |
lines.english: The Dear Lord abides in the mind, O Siblings of Destiny; ever sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੈ ਤੇ ਸਭਿ ਊਪਜੇ ਭਾਈ ਨਾਇ ਵਿਸਰਿਐ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naamai te sabh aoopaje bhaaee naae visariai mar jaae |
lines.english: From the Naam, everyone originated, O Siblings of Destiny; forgetting the Naam, they die away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਜਗਤੁ ਅੰਧੁ ਹੈ ਭਾਈ ਸੂਤੇ ਗਏ ਮੁਹਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: agiaanee jagat andh hai bhaaee soote ge muhaae |2|
lines.english: The ignorant world is blind, O Siblings of Destiny; those who sleep are plundered. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਗੇ ਸੇ ਉਬਰੇ ਭਾਈ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh jaage se ubare bhaaee bhavajal paar utaar |
lines.english: Those Gurmukhs who remain awake are saved, O Siblings of Destiny; they cross over the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਲਾਹਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਭਾਈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਰਖਿਆ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jag meh laahaa har naam hai bhaaee hiradai rakhiaa ur dhaar |3|
lines.english: In this world, the Name of the Lord is the true profit, O Siblings of Destiny; keep it enshrined within your heart. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਉ ਬੇੜਾ ਨਾਉ ਤੁਲਹੜਾ ਭਾਈ ਜਿਤੁ ਲਗਿ ਪਾਰਿ ਜਨ ਪਾਇ ॥੪॥੯॥
lines.translit: naanak naau berraa naau tulaharraa bhaaee jit lag paar jan paae |4|9|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Name of the Lord is the boat, and the Name is the raft, O Siblings of Destiny; setting out on it, the Lord's humble servant crosses over the world-ocean. ||4||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਉਬਰੇ ਭਾਈ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur saranaaee ubare bhaaee raam naam liv laae |
lines.english: In the Guru's Sanctuary, O Siblings of Destiny, you shall be saved; be lovingly attuned to the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਜਗ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਹੋਰ ਥੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sukh saagar jag antar hor thai sukh naahee |
lines.english: The True Guru is the ocean of peace in the world; there is no other place of rest and peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 3 ghar 1 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Third Mehl, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਜਗਤੁ ਦੁਖਿ ਰੋਗਿ ਵਿਆਪਿਆ ਮਰਿ ਜਨਮੈ ਰੋਵੈ ਧਾਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: haumai jagat dukh rog viaapiaa mar janamai rovai dhaahee |1|
lines.english: The world is afflicted with the painful disease of egotism; dying, only to be reborn, it cries out in pain. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: praanee satigur sev sukh paae |
lines.english: O mind, serve the True Guru, and obtain peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਧਾਤੁ ਬਹੁ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸ ਸਾਦੁ ਨ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun dhaat bahu karam kamaaveh har ras saad na aaeaa |
lines.english: Led around by the three qualities, he does many deeds, but he does not come to taste and savor the subtle essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਤਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਨਾਹਿ ਤ ਜਾਹਿਗਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seveh taa sukh paaveh naeh ta jaahigaa janam gavaae | rahaau |
lines.english: If you serve the True Guru, you shall find peace; otherwise, you shall depart, after wasting away your life in vain. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਧਿਆ ਤਰਪਣੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਗਾਇਤ੍ਰੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਬੂਝੇ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sandhiaa tarapan kareh gaaeitree bin boojhe dukh paaeaa |2|
lines.english: He says his evening prayers, and makes offerings of water, and recites his morning prayers, but without true understanding, he still suffers in pain. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀ ਜਨ ਸਦਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਸੇ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har ras pee jan sadaa tripataase vichahu aap gavaae |3|
lines.english: Drinking in the sublime essence of the Lord, His humble servants remain ever satisfied; they eradicate self-conceit from within themselves. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਸੋ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seve so vaddabhaagee jis no aap milaae |
lines.english: One who serves the True Guru is very fortunate; as the Lord so wills, he meets with the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤ ਅਖੀ ਵੇਖੈ ਘਰੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਏ ॥੪॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur milai ta akhee vekhai gharai andar sach paae |4|10|
lines.english: O Nanak, meeting with the True Guru, one sees with his eyes, and finds the True Lord within the home of his own being. ||4||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਅੰਧਾ ਸਭੁ ਅੰਧੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਮਗੁ ਨ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: eihu jag andhaa sabh andh kamaavai bin gur mag na paae |
lines.english: This world is blind, and all act blindly; without the Guru, no one finds the Path.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਬਹੁਤਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਾਗਾ ਜੁਗ ਚਾਰੇ ਭਰਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur seve bahutaa dukh laagaa jug chaare bharamaaee |
lines.english: Without serving the True Guru, he suffers in terrible pain, and throughout the four ages, he wanders aimlessly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਹੁ ਤੁਮ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo kripaa karahu tum piaare |
lines.english: O Dear Beloved Lord, please show mercy to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਦੀਨ ਤੁਮ ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਦਾਤੇ ਸਬਦੇ ਦੇਹਿ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ham deen tum jug jug daate sabade dehi bujhaaee |1|
lines.english: I am poor and meek, and throughout the ages, You are the Great Giver - please, grant me the understanding of the Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਸਾ ਮਾਰਿ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: manasaa maar dubidhaa sehaj samaanee paaeaa naam apaaraa |
lines.english: Conquering my desires and duality, I have merged in celestial peace, and I have found the Naam, the Name of the Infinite Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਵਹੁ ਆਧਾਰੇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur daataa mel milaavahu har naam devahu aadhaare | rahaau |
lines.english: Unite me in the Union of the True Guru, the Great Giver, and give me the support of the Lord's Name. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਚਾਖਿ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਆ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਕਾਟਣਹਾਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har ras chaakh man niramal hoaa kilabikh kaattanahaaraa |2|
lines.english: I have tasted the sublime essence of the Lord, and my soul has become immaculately pure; the Lord is the Destroyer of sins. ||2||
